prompt: Create a new skill for posting to Slack
note: Enters generate flow, clarifies intent, domain type (tool), and expected output

prompt: I want to refactor the review skill to add a security action
note: Enters modify flow in step 01, jumps to decompose-actions after reading existing skill

prompt: Convert my /commit-message slash command into a proper skill
note: Migration case — must run the skill-vs-command heuristic before proceeding

prompt: Edit the process step of actions/post-message.md in the slack skill
note: Single-file targeted edit inside an existing skill — no router needed, use Edit directly

prompt: Create a new slash command to format JSON
note: Slash commands are not skills; this skill must not take over. User writes the command file directly.

prompt: Write an MCP server for my internal CRM
note: MCP server authoring is out of scope for this skill

prompt: Update the project CLAUDE.md with our new doctrine
note: Project-level CLAUDE.md edits are not skill generation — direct edit

prompt: I need something to automate my weekly standup report
note: Ask whether this is a recurring automation (schedule), a skill with multiple report types, or a one-shot slash command
